Package microui

Class MicroUI

java.lang.Object
microui.MicroUI
public final class MicroUI extends Object
Core initialization and metadata class for the MicroUI library.

This singleton-style class provides the foundational setup for MicroUI components by establishing a connection to the Processing sketch context. Must be initialized before using any MicroUI functionality.

See Also:
  • setContext(PApplet)
  • getContext()

  • Method Details

    • getVersion

      public static String getVersion()
      Returns the current version of the MicroUI library.
      Returns:
      the version string in format "MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH"

    • getContext

      public static processing.core.PApplet getContext()
      Returns the Processing sketch context for MicroUI.

      This method provides access to the initialized PApplet instance, which is required by MicroUI components for rendering and Processing API access.

      Returns:
      the initialized PApplet instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if setContext(PApplet) has not been called
      See Also:
      • setContext(PApplet)

    • init

      public static MicroUI init(processing.core.PApplet pApplet)
      Initializes the MicroUI library with the given Processing sketch context.

      This method must be called once before using any MicroUI functionality. Subsequent calls return the existing instance.

      Parameters:
      pApplet - the Processing sketch context, cannot be null.
      Returns:
      the singleton MicroUI instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if pApplet is null.

    • addContainer

      public Container addContainer(Container container)
      Adds a container to the UI management system.
      Parameters:
      container - the container to add.
      Returns:
      the added container for chaining.

    • addContainer

      public Container addContainer(LayoutManager layoutManager)
      Creates a new container with the given layout manager and adds it to the UI system.
      Parameters:
      layoutManager - the layout manager for the new container.
      Returns:
      the newly created container.

    • addContainer

      public Container addContainer(LayoutManager layoutManager, String textId)
      Creates a new container with the given layout manager and string identifier, and adds it to the UI system.
      Parameters:
      layoutManager - the layout manager for the new container.
      textId - the string identifier for the container.
      Returns:
      the newly created container.

    • addContainer

      public Container addContainer(LayoutManager layoutManager, int id)
      Creates a new container with the given layout manager and numeric identifier, and adds it to the UI system.
      Parameters:
      layoutManager - the layout manager for the new container.
      id - the numeric identifier for the container.
      Returns:
      the newly created container.

    • removeContainer

      public MicroUI removeContainer(Container container)
      Removes a container from the UI management system.
      Parameters:
      container - the container to remove.
      Returns:
      this MicroUI instance for chaining.

    • removeContainer

      public MicroUI removeContainer(String textId)
      Removes a container identified by its string identifier.
      Parameters:
      textId - the string identifier of the container to remove.
      Returns:
      this MicroUI instance for chaining.

    • removeContainer

      public MicroUI removeContainer(int id)
      Removes a container identified by its numeric identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the numeric identifier of the container to remove.
      Returns:
      this MicroUI instance for chaining.

    • switchContainerOn

      public MicroUI switchContainerOn(Container container)
      Switches the active container to the specified one.
      Parameters:
      container - the container to activate.
      Returns:
      this MicroUI instance for chaining.

    • switchContainerOn

      public MicroUI switchContainerOn(String textId)
      Switches to the container identified by its string identifier.
      Parameters:
      textId - the string identifier of the container to activate.
      Returns:
      this MicroUI instance for chaining.

    • switchContainerOn

      public MicroUI switchContainerOn(int id)
      Switches to the container identified by its numeric identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the numeric identifier of the container to activate.
      Returns:
      this MicroUI instance for chaining.

    • setAnimatorEnabled

      public MicroUI setAnimatorEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables the container animator.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to enable animations, false to disable.
      Returns:
      this MicroUI instance for chaining.

    • setDebugEnabled

      public MicroUI setDebugEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables debug mode for the UI system.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to enable debug output, false to disable.
      Returns:
      this MicroUI instance for chaining.

    • getContainerManager

      public ContainerManager getContainerManager()
      Returns the container manager instance for advanced container operations.
      Returns:
      the container manager.
